cards.back: A endpoint for communication between two devices in a network, consisting of a socket address and a port number
An IP address and port number that uniquely identifies a device on a network
A programming interface that allows a program to use TCP/IP sockets

cards.front: What is the purpose of the socket address family
cards.back: To determine the type of socket address (e.g., IPv4 or IPv6)

cards.front: What is the meaning of the SOCK_STREAM option
cards.back: To establish a connection-oriented, reliable, and ordered socket
